title: Support - Device page Cancel
scenario: Cancel (X) button on Device Details modal closes modal and returns to Support page with paired devices list
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap on the Support option to open the Support page.
4. On the Support page, tap on a paired device to open the device details modal.
5. Tap the Cancel (X) button on the device details modal.
expected: The device details modal closes, and the user is returned to the Support page showing the list of paired devices.
